Welcome back! Please enter your details.
Create your account to start managing yo: Create your account to start managing your supply chain.
landing.hero_sub: Don't just count stock. Track the TRUE value of your inventory. Landed Cost, Inbound Tracking, and Digital Vault - all in one OS.
landing.pain_sub: Most importers lose money on hidden freight costs, delayed shipments, and lost documents. Stop the bleeding.
landing.pain_1_desc: You buy for $10, sell for $15, and think you made $5. But after Freight, Tax, and Trucking, you actually LOST money. We fix this.
landing.pain_2_desc: Your goods are on a ship, at the port, or in a truck. If you can't track it, you can't sell it.
landing.pain_3_desc: Customs is asking for the Packing List. You check email, WhatsApp, and Dropbox. It's gone. With Landed, it's always attached to the shipment.
landing.features_sub: We redesigned the Warehouse System to focus on what matters: The Journey and The Cost.
landing.feature_1_desc: Automatically allocate Freight, Insurance, and Duty to every single unit. Know your TRUE COGS instantly.
landing.feature_2_desc: Group POs into Containers. Track them from 'On Water' to 'Received' with one status.
landing.feature_3_desc: Attach Bill of Lading, Invoice, and Packing Lists directly to the shipment. Never lose a document again.
landing.feature_4_desc: Manage Bonded Warehouses, Racks, and Bins with precision.
landing.feature_5_desc: First-In-First-Out (FIFO) logic to ensure you sell the oldest goods first.
landing.feature_6_desc: See Real-Time Profit Margins based on accurate Landed Costs, not just purchase price.
landing.cta_footer_title: Ready to master your Supply Chain?
landing.cta_footer_sub: Join smart importers who know their true costs.
landing.footer_desc: The Operating System for Modern Importers.
